creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
The patch looks good, although I'm going to spend a little more time on
it before committing to anything.  Also, I'd prefer to try to get this
submitted upstream if possible, rather than maintaining it as a patch
locally.  Give me a few more days to play with it, and then we'll see
about getting it incorporated upstream.

Gavin
